The '''Liquidsilver L7 light blaster pistol''' was a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] used among [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]. It was named for its ability to blend into a [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] cargo hold, allowing its owner to get it unnoticed in dangerous situations.

==Behind the scenes==
This weapon can be looted from [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] NPCs in the [[Kkowir Forest/Legends|Kkowir Forest]] region on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].
